references.hebrew: וְאַנְשֵׁ֣י סְדֹ֔ם רָעִ֖ים וְחַטָּאִ֑ים לַיהֹוָ֖ה מְאֹֽד׃
references.english: Now the inhabitants of Sodom were very wicked sinners against G<small>OD</small>.

references.hebrew: וַיַּ֣רְא יְהֹוָ֔ה כִּ֥י רַבָּ֛ה רָעַ֥ת הָאָדָ֖ם בָּאָ֑רֶץ וְכׇל־יֵ֙צֶר֙ מַחְשְׁבֹ֣ת לִבּ֔וֹ רַ֥ק רַ֖ע כׇּל־הַיּֽוֹם׃
references.english:
G<small>OD</small>
 saw how great was human wickedness on earth—how every plan devised by the human mind was nothing but evil all the time.

references.english:
Therefore the wicked will not survive judgment,
nor will sinners, in the assembly of the righteous.

references.hebrew: בִּשְׁנַ֨ת שֵׁשׁ־מֵא֤וֹת שָׁנָה֙ לְחַיֵּי־נֹ֔חַ בַּחֹ֙דֶשׁ֙ הַשֵּׁנִ֔י בְּשִׁבְעָֽה־עָשָׂ֥ר י֖וֹם לַחֹ֑דֶשׁ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַזֶּ֗ה נִבְקְעוּ֙ כׇּֽל־מַעְיְנֹת֙*(בספרי ספרד ואשכנז מַעְיְנוֹת֙) תְּה֣וֹם רַבָּ֔ה וַאֲרֻבֹּ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם נִפְתָּֽחוּ׃
references.english:
In the six hundredth year of Noah’s life, in the second month, on the seventeenth day of the month, on that day
All the fountains of the great deep burst apart,
And the floodgates of the sky broke open.

references.english: When God saw how corrupt the earth was, for all flesh had corrupted its ways on earth,

references.english: God said to Noah, “I have decided to put an end to all flesh, for the earth is filled with lawlessness because of them: I am about to destroy them with the earth.

references.english: GOD said, “My breath shall not abidebabide Meaning of Heb. uncertain. in humankind forever, since it too is flesh; let the days allowed them be one hundred and twenty years.”—

references.english: This is the line of Noah.—Noah was a righteous man; he was blameless in his age; Noah walked with God.—

“Bring in My devotees,

GOD deals death and gives life,

Their homes are secure, without fear;
They do not feel the rod of God.

references.english:
Their bull breeds and does not fail;
Their cow calves and never miscarries;

references.english:
They let their infants run loose like sheep,
And their children skip about.

They sing to the music of hand-drum and lute,

If they will serve obediently,
They shall spend their days in happiness,
Their years in delight.

references.english:
They spend their days in happiness,
And go down to Sheol in peace.

references.english:
They say to God, “Leave us alone,
We do not want to learn Your ways; What is Shaddai that we should render service?
What will we gain by offering prayer?”
references.matched_snippet: שאמרו לאל סור ממנו ודעת דרכיך לא חפצנו מה שדי כי נעבדנו ומה נועיל כי נפגע בו אמרו

references.hebrew: וַאֲנִ֗י הִנְנִי֩ מֵבִ֨יא אֶת־הַמַּבּ֥וּל מַ֙יִם֙ עַל־הָאָ֔רֶץ לְשַׁחֵ֣ת כׇּל־בָּשָׂ֗ר אֲשֶׁר־בּוֹ֙ ר֣וּחַ חַיִּ֔ים מִתַּ֖חַת הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם כֹּ֥ל אֲשֶׁר־בָּאָ֖רֶץ יִגְוָֽע׃
references.english: “For My part, I am about to bring the Flood—waters upon the earth—to destroy all flesh under the sky in which there is breath of life; everything on earth shall perish.
references.matched_snippet: בטובה שהשפעתי להן בה מכעיסין אותי ובה אני דן אותם שנאמר ואני הנני מביא את המבול מים

references.hebrew: וַיֹּאמְר֣וּ לָ֭אֵל ס֣וּר מִמֶּ֑נּוּ וְדַ֥עַת דְּ֝רָכֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א חָפָֽצְנוּ׃
references.english:
They say to God, “Leave us alone,
We do not want to learn Your ways;
references.matched_snippet: שאמרו לאל סור ממנו ודעת דרכיך לא חפצנו מה שדי כי נעבדנו ומה נועיל כי נפגע בו אמרו

references.hebrew: וַיִּרְא֤וּ בְנֵי־הָֽאֱלֹהִים֙ אֶת־בְּנ֣וֹת הָֽאָדָ֔ם כִּ֥י טֹבֹ֖ת הֵ֑נָּה וַיִּקְח֤וּ לָהֶם֙ נָשִׁ֔ים מִכֹּ֖ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר בָּחָֽרוּ׃
references.english: the divine beingsadivine beings I.e., the males among them. In contrast to others “sons of God.” saw how pleasing the human women were and took wives from among those who delighted them.—
references.matched_snippet: &star רבי יוסי אמר דור המבול לא נתגאו אלא בשביל גלגל העין שדומה למים שנאמר ויקחו להם נשים
